topics: Introduction to Robotics: Overview of Robotics and Its Applications, Historical Development and Current Trends, Basic Components and Classifications of Robots
Robot Anatomy and Components: Sensors (Types, Functions, and Integration), Actuators (Motors, Servos, and Their Control), Control Systems and Feedback Mechanisms
Robot Kinematics: Coordinate Systems and Transformations, Forward and Inverse Kinematics
Robot Dynamics: Introduction to Dynamic Modeling (Newton-Euler and Lagrangian Methods)
Control Systems Fundamentals: Control Theory Basics (PID Control, State-Space Models), Implementing Control Algorithms in Robotics
Programming Robots: Introduction to Robot Programming Languages and Environments, Basic Programming Constructs and Techniques
Perception and Sensor Integration: Types of Sensors (Vision, Rangefinders, IMUs), Sensor Fusion and Data Interpretation
Motion Planning: Path Planning Algorithms (A*, PRM), Motion Planning in Dynamic Environments
Robotic Systems Integration: Integration of Hardware and Software Components, Communication Protocols and Data Exchange
Robotics in Industry: Applications in Manufacturing, Healthcare, and Other Fields, Case Studies, Current Trends and Future Directions in Robotics
Robotics and AI: Integration and Future Trends
